mechanics.excerpt: BUBSKILLS Some skills actually represent groups of related subskills_ For example character cannot simply have the Technician Skill but must possess particular aspect Technician /Electronics_ Technician/Lasers and so on_ Certain skills have specific Jists of subskills_ while others have variety depending on the desires of the players and gamemaster: For example the Arts Skill covers kinds of artistic expression from watercolor painting to clay sculpture t0 zero-G dancing: All the possibilities do not appear on the Skill List (p.
